scripts.build: pnpm --filter @smsdock/shared build && pnpm --filter @smsdock/web build && pnpm --filter @smsdock/api build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @smsdock/shared lint && pnpm --filter @smsdock/web lint && pnpm --filter @smsdock/api lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @smsdock/shared test && pnpm --filter @smsdock/web test && pnpm --filter @smsdock/api test
